其實hr有個位好需要識it,就係HRIS analyst
講就做hr其實做IT HRIS system maintenance,反而要it degree先做到

HR除左recruitment重有compensation and benefit同learning and development......大公司分得好細

C&B除左做payroll計糧,重要做salary review and compensation structure,又要做market benchmark同compliance HR policy

Learning and development即係做training,你做大公司就知平時返工都要上堂,好似銀行咁有個training centre for internal staff咁
